untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'Fundamental value estimate' which is not available in the allowed indicators list. Fundamental value is a derived metric that cannot be calculated from price/technical indicators alone. The confidence filter ('Confidence in fundamental value estimate is MEDIUM or higher') also cannot be operationalized without a fundamental value model. Position sizing proportional to mispricing magnitude also requires custom logic not supported by standard indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Attempted to translate using close price as a proxy, but this fundamentally misrepresents the signal. The signal is based on comparing market price to a fundamental value estimate (not a technical indicator). Without access to a fundamental valuation model, this signal cannot be accurately translated into a rules-based system using only the allowed technical indicators. A proper implementation would require integrating external fundamental data sources or a custom valuation function.
